title: Worn But Worthy
description: When a vanilla tool breaks, it becomes a broken version that keeps all its enchantments. Repair it later to get your tool back with a simple repair kit. Simple, lightweight, and super useful.
body:
🔧 Worn but Worthy

Ever maxed out a tool just to watch it shatter in front of you? Sucks to suck. But that's why i made this mod.

When any vanilla tool breaks, it’s not gone for good — it gets turned into a broken version of itself, keeping all of its enchantments. That way, you don’t lose your weapon forever.

💡 How it works:

Breaking a vanilla tool = it becomes a Broken Tool (same name, same enchants).

You can repair the broken version back to what it was before keeping the same enchants using a tool repair kit.

🛠 Dev Notes:

This is my first mod, and it’ll be getting updates.
If you want to help out or throw ideas my way — hit me up.
Made for literally anything, use it however you want. (if used in a modpack, make sure to give credits.)
